commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=77bab0401ea29dfb0aa54e5af957bc6f46b5f063)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds `@clawsweeper visualize` parsing, assist-lane visual prompt/comment rendering, workflow mode/lens inputs, visual self-noise filtering, and focused unit coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings from source inspection: in the PR head, workflow_dispatch mode/lens are ignored by env defaults and `renderVisualComment` appends source/model metadata after the required footer. I did not execute the workflow because this is a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real behavior proof plus maintainer scope judgment on the partial implementation and linked issue closure before any repair automation would be useful.

target.title: feat: add visualize commands
target.body:
## Summary
- add @clawsweeper visualize command parsing and dispatch through the read-only assist lane
- generate marker-backed visual brief comments that update in place by item/lens/head
- filter ClawSweeper visual comments out of later review context

Fixes https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/issues/202

## Validation
- node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p tsconfig.json --pretty false
- node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p tsconfig.repair.json --pretty false
- node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p tsconfig.dashboard.json --pretty false
- node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check .github/workflows/assist.yml src/clawsweeper.ts src/repair/comment-router-core.ts src/repair/comment-router.ts test/clawsweeper.test.ts test/repair/comment-router-core.test.ts
- node --test test/repair/comment-router-core.test.ts --test-name-pattern visualize
- node --test test/clawsweeper.test.ts --test-name-pattern "review context comment filter"
target.author: takhoffman

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
